title: The Cannon Threatens the Square
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on the cannon threatens the square, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Cannon Threatens the Square. The crew and Alabasta’s defenders race against time to stop the cannon before the city is destroyed. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That devil fruit powers can grow more powerful,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Depending on how you use them...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Using the same attacks again and again...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you really intend on winning?

summary: This part develops the cannon threatens the square and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
